scrapeDate.title: Scrape Date
scrapeDate.description: Date to scrape in YYYY-MM-DD format. Defaults to today.

poolReconcileDays.title: Pool Reconcile Days
poolReconcileDays.description: Number of past business days to re-scrape the Leads Pool Report for sales reconciliation. The CRM retroactively attributes pool sales to the assignment date — this picks up those updates. Set to 5 for production. Only sales_made and premium from these re-scrapes are used.

saleMadeOutboundTypeBySite.title: Sale-made outbound type override by agency
saleMadeOutboundTypeBySite.description: Map Apify agency keys (RMT, CHA) to the CRM admin-sale-made `type=` filter id for the outbound pass only. Use when the CRM renames the remote OB line (e.g. Luminary Life remote team). Leave empty string to use the default Exclusive (OB) id.

saleMadePassesBySite.title: Full sale-made passes override by agency
saleMadePassesBySite.description: Optional. Per agency key, full list of { typeFilter, channel: inbound|outbound|custom, label? } objects replacing all default sale-made passes for that agency.

salesBackfillDates.title: Sales-only backfill dates
salesBackfillDates.description: When set, the actor SKIPS all other reports and only re-scrapes the Sale Made Report for each ISO date provided. Use for late-sweep workflows that catch sales entered after the daily scrape ran. Output items are `{ _type: 'sale_made_backfill', scrape_date, agents }` and ingest with mode='sales_only' to preserve dials/talk/leads.
